title: Ciena (CIEN) & Flex Partner for Pluggable OLT Manufacturing
text: Ciena (CIEN) and Flex team up to develop pluggable OLTs and ONUs to help U.S. network providers enhance their local presence.

title: Ciena Invests in U.S. Manufacturing with Flex to Support BEAD-funded Projects, Strengthen Domestic Supply Chain and Add High-Tech Jobs
text: HANOVER, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ciena® (NYSE: CIEN), a U.S.-based networking systems, services and software company, is adding domestic manufacturing through an expanded agreement with global diversified manufacturer Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX). Ciena is expected to begin production of the industry's first pluggable optical line terminals (OLTs) as well as its optical network units (ONU) at a Flex factory in the U.S. in mid-2024. Advancing its commitment to roll out high-speed broadband to unserved and.

title: Cirion Picks Ciena's 800G Technology for Bogotá Metro DCI Deployment
text: HANOVER, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cirion Technologies deployed Ciena's Waveserver 5 platform to expand connectivity and increase resiliency between data centers in Bogotá, Colombia.

title: Ciena Announces Reporting Date and Web Broadcast for Fiscal Fourth Quarter and Year End 2023 Results
text: HANOVER, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ciena® Corporation expects to announce its fiscal fourth quarter and year-end financial results on Thursday, December 7, 2023.

title: Ciena: Capitalizing On Growing Demand Drivers
text: Ciena Corporation is expanding its market share in the optical systems sector and has strong growth targets. The company's recent financial results exceeded expectations, driven by its Webscale business. Ciena has long-term growth visibility and potential opportunities to increase market share in Europe and through 5G network expansion in India.
